import axios from'axios';const BASE='https://jback2.zynix.us/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:BASE});// Attach token to every request
api.interceptors.request.use(cfg=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('access_token');if(token)cfg.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);if(cfg.data instanceof FormData){delete cfg.headers['Content-Type'];}return cfg;});// Auto-refresh on 401
api.interceptors.response.use(r=>r,async err=>{var _err$response;const orig=err.config;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401&&!orig._retry){orig._retry=true;try{const refresh=localStorage.getItem('refresh_token');const _await$axios$post=await axios.post("".concat(BASE,"/auth/token/refresh/"),{refresh}),data=_await$axios$post.data;localStorage.setItem('access_token',data.access);orig.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(data.access);return api(orig);}catch(_unused){localStorage.clear();window.location.href='/login';}}return Promise.reject(err);});// ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const login=d=>api.post('/auth/login/',d);export const me=()=>api.get('/auth/me/');export const register=d=>api.post('/auth/register/',d);export const allUsers=()=>api.get('/auth/admin/users/');export const assignRole=(userId,role)=>api.post("/auth/admin/users/".concat(userId,"/assign-role/"),{role});export const updateUser=(userId,d)=>api.patch("/auth/admin/users/".concat(userId,"/"),d);export const deleteUser=userId=>api.delete("/auth/admin/users/".concat(userId,"/"));export const resetUserPassword=(userId,d)=>api.post("/auth/admin/users/".concat(userId,"/reset-password/"),d||{});// ── Exams ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getAdminExams=()=>api.get('/courses/admin/exams/');export const createExam=d=>api.post('/courses/admin/exams/',d);export const updateExam=(id,d)=>api.patch("/courses/admin/exams/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const deleteExam=id=>api.delete("/courses/admin/exams/".concat(id,"/"));// ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getCategories=examId=>api.get('/courses/admin/categories/',{params:{exam:examId}});export const createCategory=d=>api.post('/courses/admin/categories/',d);export const updateCategory=(id,d)=>api.patch("/courses/admin/categories/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const deleteCategory=id=>api.delete("/courses/admin/categories/".concat(id,"/"));// ── Lessons ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getLessons=catId=>api.get('/courses/admin/lessons/',{params:{category:catId}});export const getLessonDetail=id=>api.get("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(id,"/"));export const createLesson=d=>api.post('/courses/admin/lessons/',d);export const updateLesson=(id,d)=>api.patch("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const deleteLesson=id=>api.delete("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(id,"/"));// ── Study Import ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const downloadStudyTemplate=lessonId=>api.get("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(lessonId,"/study-import/"),{responseType:'blob'});export const importStudy=(lessonId,file)=>{const fd=new FormData();fd.append('file',file);return api.post("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(lessonId,"/study-import/"),fd);};export const deleteStudyItems=ids=>api.post('/courses/admin/study-items/bulk-delete/',{ids});// ── Question Banks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getBanks=lessonId=>api.get("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(lessonId,"/banks/"));export const createBank=(lessonId,d)=>api.post("/courses/admin/lessons/".concat(lessonId,"/banks/"),d);export const getBankDetail=id=>api.get("/courses/admin/banks/".concat(id,"/"));export const updateBank=(id,d)=>api.patch("/courses/admin/banks/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const deleteBank=id=>api.delete("/courses/admin/banks/".concat(id,"/"));export const downloadBankTemplate=bankId=>api.get("/courses/admin/banks/".concat(bankId,"/import/"),{responseType:'blob'});export const importBank=(bankId,file)=>{const fd=new FormData();fd.append('file',file);return api.post("/courses/admin/banks/".concat(bankId,"/import/"),fd);};// ── Institutions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getInstitutions=()=>api.get('/institutions/');export const createInstitution=d=>api.post('/institutions/',d);export const getInstitution=id=>api.get("/institutions/".concat(id,"/"));export const updateInstitution=(id,d)=>api.patch("/institutions/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const getInstitutionStudents=institutionId=>api.get("/auth/admin/users/?institution_id=".concat(institutionId));export const getInstitutionMentors=institutionId=>api.get("/institutions/".concat(institutionId,"/mentors/"));export const getInstitutionAssignments=institutionId=>api.get("/institutions/".concat(institutionId,"/assignments/"));export const assignMentor=(institutionId,studentId,mentorId)=>api.post("/institutions/".concat(institutionId,"/assignments/"),{student_id:studentId,mentor_id:mentorId});export const deleteMentorAssignment=assignmentId=>api.delete("/institutions/assignments/".concat(assignmentId,"/"));// ── Announcements ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getAnnouncements=()=>api.get('/announcements/');export const createAnnouncement=d=>api.post('/announcements/',d);export const updateAnnouncement=(id,d)=>api.patch("/announcements/".concat(id,"/"),d);// ── RolePlay: Admin Stories ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const rpAdminGetStories=()=>api.get('/roleplay/admin/stories/');export const rpAdminGetStory=id=>api.get("/roleplay/admin/stories/".concat(id,"/"));export const rpAdminUpdateStory=(id,d)=>api.patch("/roleplay/admin/stories/".concat(id,"/"),d);export const rpAdminDeleteStory=id=>api.delete("/roleplay/admin/stories/".concat(id,"/"));export const rpAdminDownloadTemplate=()=>api.get('/roleplay/admin/stories/template/',{responseType:'blob'});export const rpAdminImportExcel=file=>{const fd=new FormData();fd.append('file',file);return api.post('/roleplay/admin/stories/import/',fd);};// ── RolePlay: Public ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const rpGetStories=()=>api.get('/roleplay/stories/');export const rpGetStory=id=>api.get("/roleplay/stories/".concat(id,"/"));// ── RolePlay: Rooms ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const rpGetRooms=params=>api.get('/roleplay/rooms/',{params});export const rpCreateRoom=d=>api.post('/roleplay/rooms/',d);export const rpGetRoom=code=>api.get("/roleplay/rooms/".concat(code,"/"));export const rpJoinRoom=code=>api.post("/roleplay/rooms/".concat(code,"/join/"));export const rpSpinRoom=code=>api.post("/roleplay/rooms/".concat(code,"/spin/"));export const rpSelectCharacter=(code,charId)=>api.post("/roleplay/rooms/".concat(code,"/select-character/"),{character_id:charId});export const rpSubmitLine=(code,d)=>api.post("/roleplay/rooms/".concat(code,"/submit-line/"),d);// ── RolePlay: History ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const rpGetHistory=()=>api.get('/roleplay/history/');export default api;
